ground_truth.title: Figma: The Collaborative Interface Design Tool
ground_truth.main_content:
Make anything possible, all in Figma

Figma lets you turn big ideas into real products. Brainstorm, design, and build with your team.

Prompt, code, and design from first idea to final product

Prompt to code anything you can imagine with AI.

Figma helps us paint the north star for the whole company. It keeps everyone aligned and excited.

Henry Modisett, Head of Design

Bring everyone together with systems that scale

Share libraries and design systems across teams. Create reusable components, variables, and brand assets to keep your entire organization building with the same visual language.

Unlock your team with on-brand templates. Share templates with your organization so anyone can quickly create social media assets, display ads, one-pagers, and more.

Create one source of truth for devs and designers. Get specs, annotations, and code snippets in one dedicated space with Dev Mode.

Ship products, any way you want

Turn Figma context into code

Our Figma MCP server lets you bring Figma context directly into your agentic coding tools.

Publish custom websites -- with or without code

Design responsive websites in Figma Sites, then tweak with code or AI until everything is just right.

Ship products faster with AI

Drop a design file into Figma Make and chat with AI to quickly create a live, functional app.

Nearly everything that designers and developers need is available in Figma.

Diana Mounter, Head of Design

Start with a template. Make just about anything.
